license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.icpcavn
title: Arnow Test for Catecholate-Type Siderophores
author: Dr. Steven Wilhelm

steps_raw.instruction: Bring 100 µL siderophore sample to 1 mL final volume with Milli-Q H 2 O
Add 1 mL of reagent 1 (0.5 N HCl) and mix undetermined
Add 1 mL of reagent 2 (10 g NaNO 2 , 10 g Na MO in 10 mL ultrapure, Chelex-100 treated H 2 O) and mix undetermined Omit this step for a blank sample.
Add 1 mL of reagent 3 (1 M NaOH) and mix undetermined
Add 1 mL H 2 O and mix undetermined
Allow 10-40 min for color reaction, and read in spectrophotometer at 500 nm 00:40:00
For a standard curve, use DHBA (dihydroxybenzoic acid)
